channel.title: The Feed on nehwe.tech
channel.description: Recent content in The Feed on nehwe.tech

item.title: Hardening a Home Network in a Weekend
item.description: A no-nonsense checklist for locking down your router, IoT devices, and guest network without breaking anything.

item.title: Three USB Security Keys Worth Owning
item.description: What a hardware key actually protects you from, and which ones are worth the money in 2026.

item.title: What an AI Receptionist Can (and Can't) Do
item.description: Behind a real build for a local gym — what it handles on its own and where a human still has to step in.

item.title: Why Small Businesses Get Phished More Than You'd Think
item.description: Small shops assume they’re too small to be a target. That assumption is exactly what makes them one.

item.title: Building a Home Lab on a Budget
item.description: You don’t need a rack of enterprise gear to start learning. Here’s what actually matters for a first home lab.

item.title: The Real Cost of a 'Free' Website Builder
item.description: The free tier gets you a site. It doesn’t get you one that’s actually yours, or one that shows up in search.
